case_title: HUGUANG LI ET AL VS. SUM YUEN LAI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS WERE ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BENJAMIN GIANG. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---CATHERINE HONG. BOTH INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. CROSS--DEFENDANTS (2) WAIVE SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LAI, SUM YUEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LI, HUGUANG LI, ZONG JING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, December 9, 2015, in Department 525:
Huguang Li and Zong Jung Li, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as Propria Persona with witness Yao Kun Shi. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Anthony Tam, who is present for Respondent/Plaintiff.
Sum Yuen Lai, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Amy Lo, who is present for Respondent/Plaintiff.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Huguang Li testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Cantonese interpreter, Anthony Tam.

Appellant, Sum Yuen Lai testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Cantonese interpreter Amy Lo. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibit not marked - contract

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly unmarked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Judgment Entered
